title: Report Object Schema
description: Schema for Report objects representing collections of Data objects

report_name.description: Human-readable name for this report or dataset

report_description.description: Clear description of what this report contains and its purpose

report_type.description: Type of report (transcript, dataset, analysis, summary, etc.)

source_study_id.description: ID of the Study this report is associated with

data_count.description: Total number of Data objects in this report

created_by.description: ID of the researcher who created this report

data_ids.description: Array of Data object IDs that belong to this report

report_structure.description: Outline or structure of the report sections

key_findings.description: High-level findings or insights from this report

report_url.description: URL to the published or shared report

tags.description: System-derived tags from DUX scan (not manually added)
